meaning: vt.压碎,碾碎,压服,压垮,粉碎,(使)变形
examples: She had a crush on you, you know.
They crush the olives with a heavy wooden press.
Don't chew, break, or crush the tablet.
That logic may also apply to the crush of returns filed on extension October 15th.
Kerry went on to crush Dean in New Hampshire and roll to the nomination.
